Contact Advice Surgeries Book an appointment Contact me Press Enquiries Privacy Policy Work with me Emergency and Support Services Acceptable Behaviour Policy Pride in Place Ashley fights for major investment in Skem – and wants your views More Menu Parliamentary Work Ashley speaking in the House of Commons As your MP, it is my responsibility to represent you in Parliament. This includes, speaking in debates in the Chamber, asking Oral questions of Government Ministers, making contributions to the committee stages of legislation, and voting on the business of the day. Below, you can see just some of the ways I have been working for you in Parliament. If you want to keep in touch with all the work I am doing to represent you in Westminster and here in West Lancashire, you can sign up for my monthly newsletter.
